title: Maturity Levels
description: Key stages in a standard’s lifecycle—from early drafting to publication, long‑term adoption, and eventual retirement. Each status reflects how mature, stable, and widely accepted a standard is at any point in its development.
keywords: standard lifecycle, specification development, version status
